Corporate sustainability reporting As part of its February 2025 omnibus package , the Commission proposed a series of changes to the EU’s Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD) . Th

ure delays by two years (until 2028) the reporting requirements for companies currently in the scope of CSRD and which would have been required to report as of 2026 or 2027. The European Parliament and the Council have already approved this measure and Member States must now transpose it into their national laws by the end
